data.title: American Parkinson Disease Association Welcomes Three Distinguished Leaders to National Board of Directors
data.description: Three distinguished professionals have joined the National Board of the American Parkinson Disease Association (APDA) to contribute their healthcare expertise, creative vision, and lived experience towards advancing the organization's mission. The new board members are set to play a vital role in shaping the future of APDA and bringing fresh perspectives to the table. The appointment announcement was made in New York on April 22, 2026. This move underscores APDA's commitment to furthering its cause and benefitting from diverse talents and backgrounds.

data.title: New five-star awards for Scania in Euro NCAP
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, on April 22, 2026, Scania's P-series cab P4x2 distribution and P6x2 utility, along with Scania's L4x2 distribution, have attained top ratings in the Euro NCAP's Safer Trucks program. This recognition signifies the exceptional safety standards upheld by these vehicles, setting a benchmark for others in the industry. The achievement is especially noteworthy as it pertains to critical safety features, emphasizing Scania's commitment to excellence in manufacturing.

data.title: Stratiphy allows UK investors tax-free route to crypto ETNs again after HMRC change affecting retail investors.
data.description: Stratiphy has announced the reopening of a tax-free pathway for crypto Exchange Traded Notes (ETNs) in the UK. This move comes in response to a recent rule change by HM Revenue & Customs (HMRC) that limited retail investors' access. As a result, investors can once again utilize this tax-efficient method for investing in cryptocurrencies, providing them with a practical option in the UK market.
